errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.couldntConnect: Couldn't connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
errors.failedToLoadProperly: A component failed to load properly.
errors.requiredFileCouldntLoad: A required file couldn't be loaded. This usually fixes itself on restart.

messages.network: Check your connection and try again.
messages.timeout: Request took too long. Try again.
messages.server: Something went wrong on our end. Try again in a few minutes.
messages.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action.
messages.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
messages.validation: Invalid data. Please check your input.
messages.conflict: Conflict detected. The resource may have been modified.
messages.badGateway: Server is unreachable. Try again later.
messages.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
messages.gatewayTimeout: Server is not responding. Try again later.
messages.externalHint: Check the URL and settings, then try again.

api.workflow: Workflow service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.

confirmation.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
confirmation.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
confirmation.removeMessage: This won't delete the code folder from your device — it only removes it from the ORGII workspace. You can re-add it anytime.
confirmation.deleteWorkspaceMessage: This deletes the workspace preset only. Member repos and folders are not affected.
confirmation.deleteSelectedMessage: This removes the selected workspaces and unlinks the selected repos. Repo files on disk are not deleted.
confirmation.disconnectMessage: This will remove access to all repos from this account.
confirmation.dropStashMessage: This will permanently delete {{stashRef}}. This action cannot be undone.
confirmation.popAllStashesMessage: This will apply all {{count}} stash(es) and remove them from the stash list.
confirmation.removeStepMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this step? This might disrupt the reasoning and actions of Atlas.
confirmation.reloadFileMessage: You have unsaved changes. Reloading will discard them. Continue?
confirmation.unsavedCloseMessage: "{{name}}" has unsaved changes. Close without saving?
confirmation.unsavedCloseMultipleMessage: {{count}} file(s) have unsaved changes. Close them anyway?
confirmation.undoAllChanges: This will revert all {{count}} file changes made by the agent. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
confirmation.redoAllChanges: This will re-apply the previously reverted file changes. Continue?
confirmation.removeFolderMessage: The folder will be removed from this workspace. No files will be deleted.
